caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a presentation on a "Rural Community Food System." The main content is a white slide titled "Introduction," which poses the question, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community Source as as possible from locally owned and operated to benefit the community." Below this, a "Session Videos" section lists several timestamps. The text notes that users can contribute to the model by "adding communities or by knowing a member to evolve the map," and directs viewers to "the former Wiki Collaborative Library for full art of guides, especially the Crit Nuts." To the right of the text is a complex green network diagram. In the top right corner of the browser window, a small video feed shows a man with glasses wearing a dark shirt. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains relatively still, while the browser window remains static, showing no changes in the on-screen text or images.
